title: buteraea foetidissima
intro: Buteraea foetidissima, also known as the stinking goosefoot, is a plant species that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family and is characterized by its unpleasant odor. The medicinal properties of Buteraea foetidissima include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Buteraea foetidissima include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
